generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital expanded domestic security powers are. Remember the 2024 cyberattacks on our infrastructure? We need proactive measures, not just reactive ones. My niece, a college student, told me she feels safer knowing authorities can act swiftly when threats emerge. It's about balance - protecting freedoms while ensuring safety. #NationalSecurityMatters
